title: Parent — Settings & Security
content:
Overview


The Settings page allows parents to manage their profile, password, two-factor authentication, and theme preferences. It is divided into three sections: Profile, Security, and Preferences.



Profile Settings


The Profile section displays the parent's account information:


  • Display Name: The name shown throughout the portal. Click Edit to change it
  • Email Address: The email associated with the account — shows a "Verified" badge. This cannot be changed by the parent
  • Account Created: The date the parent account was registered

Editing Profile:


  1. Click Edit next to Display Name
  2. Enter a new display name
  3. Click Save


Security — Password


Changing Password:


  1. Click Change next to Password
  2. Enter Current Password
  3. Enter New Password (minimum 8 characters)
  4. Enter Confirm New Password
  5. Click Update

A "Last changed" date is displayed so parents know when their password was last updated.



Security — Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)


The 2FA section shows the current status and provides buttons to enable or disable.


Enabling 2FA — Step by Step:


  1. Click Enable 2FA
  2. Step 1 — Scan QR Code: A QR code appears. Scan it with Google Authenticator, Authy, or any TOTP app. A manual entry key is displayed below for apps that don't support scanning
  3. Click I've scanned it — Next
  4. Step 2 — Verify: Enter the 6-digit code from the authenticator app. Click Verify & Activate
  5. Step 3 — Backup Codes: After successful verification, backup codes are displayed. Save these codes securely — they will not be shown again
  6. Click Done — I've saved my codes

Disabling 2FA:


  1. Click Disable 2FA
  2. Enter current password
  3. Enter the 6-digit code from the authenticator app
  4. Click Disable 2FA

If the parent loses access to their authenticator and has no backup codes, they must contact the school admin or Tklesson support to have 2FA disabled.



Preferences


Theme: Choose between Light and Dark mode. The change applies immediately to the entire portal.



Key Talking Points for Agents


  • "You can change your display name anytime — it updates across the whole portal."
  • "Your email address can't be changed from Settings. Contact your school admin if it needs updating."
  • "When setting up 2FA, save your backup codes somewhere safe. They won't be shown again."
  • "If you lose your authenticator app and don't have backup codes, your school admin or our support team can disable 2FA for you."
  • "Dark mode is available in Preferences if you prefer a darker interface."
